title: For a Body in Pain
scripture_text: My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.
reflection: Pain is not a punishment. It is a messenger. Sometimes the only way to hear the body is for the body to scream.
body:
Today is a bad day. The pain is loud, and the small things you used to do without thinking are now mountains. You are not weak. Pain is hard. Pain that other people cannot see is harder.

The Lord is not asking you to be grateful for the pain. He is asking you to not be alone in it. He is in the bed with you, in the same way He was in the furnace with Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego. The fire did not go away. He was in it with them.

Take the medicine if you have it. Do not be a hero. Call the doctor if you need to. Rest. Rest is not laziness. Rest is a holy thing.

This day will end. Tomorrow may be a little better. You are not alone.
prayer: Lord, I hurt. Hold me. Be the warmth when I cannot find it. Amen.
